$comment: Captioned YouTube fixture for the docker-compose harness. AC-6 evidence. Replaced 2026-07-01 after probe finding F5: the original (h7zV9Bzklv8) returned a page-chrome interstitial. Verified via `yt-dlp --list-subs` that this video has real captions and substantive spoken content, so it exercises the caption-transcript path (not the description/ASR fallback). Ken Robinson's 'Do schools kill creativity?' is the most-viewed TED talk — extremely stable. Swap the URL if it ever stops resolving; confirm any replacement has captions via yt-dlp --list-subs.
title: Ken Robinson: Do schools kill creativity? (TED, captioned)
